name: Velvet EQ
explanation: A passive program equalizer with a vintage tube-EQ character. The low band can boost and attenuate at once — the cut sits just above the boost to carve the famous resonant low end — while the high band adds a broad presence/air peak with a selectable centre plus an independent gentle high-shelf attenuation. Controls: Low Freq, Low Boost, Low Atten, High Boost Freq, High Boost and High Atten.
